headline: A Flesh-Eating Fly Adds to the Beef Industry’s List of Problems
summary: The parasitic fly has been detected in the U.S. for the first time in 60 years, putting pressure on an already shrinking cattle population.

headline: Zoetis Releases 2025 Sustainability Report: Advancing Sustainability in Animal Health for a Better Future
summary: PARSIPPANY, N.J., June 04, 2026--Zoetis published its 2025 Sustainability Report, highlighting progress achieved in 2025 through its Driven to Care strategy. This report marks a significant milestone as Zoetis delivers on its initial aspirations set in 2021 and introduces its next phase with renewed focus across Communities, Animals, and the Planet.

headline: SCHD-Inspired 4-Factor Dividend Growth Strategy Selections For June 2026
summary: The 4-Factor Dividend Growth Strategy, inspired by SCHD, targets high-quality, growth-oriented dividend stocks using a rules-based, four-metric screen.
